---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-hero">
  <div class="profile-photo-wrap">
    <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Profile photo" class="profile-photo" onerror="this.style.display='none'; document.querySelector('.profile-photo-placeholder').style.display='flex';" />
    <div class="profile-photo-placeholder">GC</div>
  </div>
  <div class="profile-text">
    <h1 class="profile-name">Gary Chang</h1>
    <p class="profile-title">Data/GIS Scientist, Researcher, Systems Engineer</p>
    <p class="profile-affiliation">University of Texas at Dallas</p>
    <div class="profile-links">
      <a href="mailto:your@email.com" class="profile-link">✉ Email</a>
      <a href="cv/cv.pdf" class="profile-link" target="_blank">↗ CV</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/gchang1020" class="profile-link" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## About

I am a data scientist and systems engineer with a multidisciplinary background spanning software development, data engineering, geospatial analysis, and advanced statistical modeling. I build and integrate data-driven systems across CRM, ERP, and analytics platforms, and develop end-to-end workflows from data acquisition and engineering through machine learning and interpretation.

My analytical toolkit includes Bayesian inference (INLA), survival analysis, causal inference, and spatial-temporal modeling, with hands-on experience in R, Python, SQL, ArcGIS Pro, and Google Earth Engine. I bridge technical infrastructure and quantitative analysis — turning raw, heterogeneous data into reliable, decision-ready insights.

## Skills

**Programming & Data** · R · Python · SQL · Java · C++

**Geospatial** · ArcGIS Pro · Google Earth Engine · Remote Sensing · Spatial Interpolation

**Machine Learning** · YOLO · RoboFlow · Predictive Modeling · Data Labeling

**Statistical Methods** · Bayesian Inference (INLA) · Survival Analysis · Causal Inference (DID, RDD, PSM) · GLM/GLMM · Time-Series

**Databases & Systems** · MySQL · PostgreSQL · CRM/ERP Integration · Data Pipelines
